body_copy: Our experts are ready to help you find the right solution for your data and analytics needs.

Capitalize helps you turn fragmented data, legacy reports, and emerging AI tools into a connected analytics ecosystem that drives real business outcomes. From data strategy and engineering to business intelligence, advanced analytics, and automation, we design and deliver solutions that make AI practical, trusted, and ready for everyday decision-making.
Talk with our team about your goals, challenges, and the outcomes you want to achieve.

Capitalize is a data, analytics and AI consulting firm that helps organizations turn information into insight and insight into action. We solve real business problems—not just implement tools. Our teams work side-by-side with yours to design, build, and support solutions that are practical and focused on measurable outcomes.
Deep technical + domain expertise – Consultants who can talk strategy with executives and get hands-on in the data with your technical teams.
End-to-end delivery – From data strategy and architecture to build, rollout, and managed services, we stay with you through the full lifecycle.
Practical, usable solutions – We prioritize adoption, usability, and performance so your teams actually use what we build.
We’re not a “build it and disappear” consulting shop. We work side-by-side with your stakeholders to understand your goals, design practical solutions, and transfer knowledge as we go.
Business-first, tool-agnostic – We start with outcomes, then recommend the right mix of platforms like Power BI, Alteryx, Snowflake, and others.
Hands-on experts – Our consultants design, build, and optimize solutions every day. You work directly with practitioners.
Enablement built in – Training, documentation, and adoption support are baked into our projects so your team can own and extend the solution.

Capitalize delivers measurable impact across automation, analytics, and data integration. Our clients achieve meaningful time savings, operational cost reductions, and streamlined processes that accelerate performance.

No matter your industry, if you run on data, we can help. From healthcare and financial services to manufacturing, retail, and beyond, our team understands how to adapt analytics, AI, and automation to your unique business model and challenges.
We help organizations turn disconnected data, manual processes, and scattered tools into a connected analytics ecosystem that drives smarter decisions every day.
[](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/ai-and-advanced-analytics/)
We design and deploy practical AI and advanced analytics solutions that turn your data into predictions, recommendations, and always-on decision support.
[](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/business-intelligence/)
We design and deliver intuitive, self-service BI dashboards and reports that give your teams real-time visibility into performance and empower faster, data-driven decisions.
[](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/data-strategy-advisory/)
We build clear, actionable data strategies that align technology, governance, and analytics with your business goals and KPIs.
[](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/data-engineering-integration/)
We architect and implement modern data platforms and pipelines that deliver trusted, high-quality data to the right people and systems, at the right time.
[](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/process-automation/)
We automate manual, spreadsheet-driven processes so your teams can focus on high-value work while your workflows run reliably in the background.
[](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/managed-services/)
We provide ongoing support, optimization, and enhancement of your analytics, data, and automation solutions so they stay healthy, secure, and continuously improving.
[](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/training/)
We offer practical, customized training to help teams successfully adopt and scale AI, analytics, and automation technologies

We assess the health and performance of your Alteryx environment and deliver actionable recommendations to optimize performance, reduce risk, and ensure your Alteryx platform is delivering maximum value.
Our Alteryx Managed Services deliver proactive support and optimization so your team can focus on insights while we handle the platform.
Our Alteryx Lifecycle Governance defines version control, promotion processes, access controls, and deployment standards to manage workflows across development, test, and production environments.
Explore the future of intelligent automation as UiPath integrates agentic AI, transforming traditional RPA into adaptive, autonomous systems.

Catch up on the latest webinars to learn real-world techniques that elevate your analytics and automation initiatives.
A practical blueprint for turning “AI” from a buzzword into a business plan that actually works.
Streamline your finance operations with Alteryx and Capitalize’s Office of Finance Blueprint! Automate tasks, boost efficiency, and make smarter decisions.
See how Alteryx and GenAI work together in real-world scenarios to eliminate manual data work and unlock valuable insights from unstructured data.
Discover the right Alteryx governance for your organization! Learn how to scale, manage risks, and implement maturity frameworks.

Whether you’re exploring AI, automating workflows, or modernizing your data environment, our team is here to help you find the right path forward. Tell us what you’re working on—and we’ll show you how Capitalize can accelerate results.

headings.text: Give Your Audit Team the Data It Needs — Without the Fire Drill
Audit Is Always Under the Microscope
Audit Is Essential — But Rarely Welcome
The Future of Audit Is Data-Driven
Deep Audit Experience You Can Count On
Not sure where to start? Here are two fast, low-risk options.
Managed Services Built for Audit, Risk, and Compliance Teams
Let Capitalize Run Your Platforms — So You Can Run the Business.
[Automate Your Next Audit with Alteryx and UiPath](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/webinars/automate-your-next-audit-with-alteryx-and-uipath/)
[“AI” to ROI in 45 Days – \ \ Less Hype. More Help.](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/webinars/ai-to-roi-in-45-days-less-hype-more-help/)

[Alteryx Users: Streamline Your External Audit with WAM with Insights from KPMG](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/webinars/alteryx-users-streamline-your-external-audit-with-wam-with-insights-from-kpmg/)

body_copy: Capitalize helps audit and risk teams automate data gathering, testing, and monitoring so they can strengthen controls, reduce findings, and hit every deadline — without burning out the team.
Audit deadlines don’t move. Financial statement audits, SOX testing, internal audits, regulatory exams, and Audit Committee meetings all operate on rigid timetables.
The expectation is clear: The work must be complete, defensible, and accurate.
There’s no room for error when it comes to:
Control failures can lead to material weaknesses, significant deficiencies, and increased regulatory scrutiny.
Incomplete populations or samples can undermine the credibility of your audit work.
Weak documentation can turn a solid audit into a difficult conversation with management, external auditors, or regulators.
Meanwhile, the business keeps changing — new systems, new products, new processes — while many audit teams are still working like it’s 2005.
Internal and external auditors have an incredibly complex job: dig into processes, surface risks, and recommend improvements, all while the people being audited wish you weren’t there.
Few, if any, business units ever say, “I hope we get audited.”
Audit is expected to be thorough, precise, and fast despite resistance.
In audit, one thing is guaranteed: data will keep pouring in.
The auditors who thrive will be those who can:
Work confidently with data and automation.
Use analytics to identify risk faster and with more precision.
Support continuous audit and monitoring with scalable, repeatable workflows.
Teams that embrace automation and digital transformation will become the benchmark for auditing globally.
We design solutions that match how auditors really work — practical, transparent, and defensible.
Use data-driven analysis of transactions, trends, and anomalies to target higher-risk areas and prioritize audit focus.
Validate that populations are complete and reliable before sampling, reducing rework and disputes later.
Provide leadership with dashboards that tie risks, controls, and results together in a clear, visual way.
Automate repeatable tests (like access, segregation of duties, and transactional thresholds) using repeatable workflows.
Generate standardized, audit-ready evidence packages with a few clicks instead of manual extraction every cycle.
Create consistent, data-backed documentation that external auditors and regulators can review and trust.
Monitor key controls and processes throughout the period, not just at quarter- or year-end.
Surface anomalies, outliers, and potential violations so your team can focus on investigation—not data chasing.
Provide Audit, Finance, and Operations leaders with up-to-date views of control health and emerging risks.
Connect ERP, HR, CRM, and operational systems into a central, governed environment for audit use.
Replace one-off data pulls with reusable, documented queries that anyone on the team can run.
Feed test results directly into standardized workpaper formats so documentation is faster and more consistent.
Explore where managed services can relieve the most pressure and create the most impact for your team.
A focused ideation conversation where we map your current reality — firefights, bottlenecks, and wish-list improvements.
Clarify What to Hand Off: Identify which platform tasks drain the most time and should shift to a managed partner.
Spot High-Impact Opportunities: Surface the areas where proactive monitoring, optimization, or transformation would deliver the biggest win.
Shape a Potential Model: Walk away with a clearer sense of what a right-sized managed services engagement could include for you.
Understand how ready you are for managed services — and where you stand to gain the most.
Reveal Hidden Risks: See where your current support approach leaves you vulnerable to outages, performance issues, or key-person dependencies.
Quantify the Strain: Understand how much effort your team is spending on “keeping the lights on” versus strategic work.
Highlight Value Levers: Pinpoint the areas (KTLO, continuous improvement, or transformation) where managed services could create the fastest impact.
A focused 30-minute session to identify your top audit automation opportunities and what it will take to get started.
We combine steady, reliable support with proactive guidance so your platforms keep improving — not just staying online.
We start by learning your platforms, current pain points, and what “good” looks like for your teams. Together, we align on scope, responsibilities, and the right service tier.
We put monitoring, processes, and SLAs in place to reduce noise and risk. From there, we standardize how changes move through environments and automate wherever possible.
Once the lights are reliably on, we shift focus to continuous improvement and transformation — finding new ways to increase adoption, performance, and business value.
Tell us how you’re supporting your analytics and automation platforms today, and we’ll show you how we can reduce risk, free up your team, and unlock more value.
Schedule a 30-minute complimentary review.

Audit teams continue to be tasked with doing more work with fewer resources. Broken calculations and human error are common elements that take away from accuracy and completeness. Learn how to use automation to prepare for your audits.

A practical blueprint for turning “AI” from a buzzword into a business plan that actually works. Take advanage of the special offer at the end of the webinar to start getting some ROI fro the AI used by your department.
Organizations utilizing Alteryx to automate critical accounting processes will inevitably find their workflows come under internal and external audit.

pages.description: Find rewarding opportunities with a collaborative consulting team dedicated to analytics excellence, automation innovation, and client impact., Find rewarding opportunities with a collaborative consulting team dedicated to analytics excellence, automation innovation, and client impact.

headings.text: Never step or be stepped on.
Don't just do it, OWN it!
Didn’t find a position you’re looking for?

body_copy: We partner with best-in class technologies like Alteryx, Tableau, Snowflake, Workday, IBM, Microsoft and UiPath, focusing on simplifying business intelligence and analytics for everyone. Capitalize offers the chance to build unparalleled networks and the opportunity to work with great people. Our focus is, and always will be, our customers. We lead the way in providing innovative solutions to help companies see and understand their data – allowing them to drive faster, smarter, better business decisions and results.
If you like being on the cutting edge of technology innovation, and you want to be on a winning team, then let’s make it happen!

When you’re part of the Capitalize team, you’re not just contributing to meaningful work — you’re part of a supportive, collaborative community that truly has your back. We believe the best results come from working together, leaving unnecessary competition at the door, and focusing on what matters: doing great work as a team.

Here, creativity and ambition are encouraged, ideas are respected, and every voice matters. We value diverse perspectives and unique skill sets because they make our work stronger and our solutions better. Each week brings new challenges, and we meet them head-on — which means you’ll be continually learning, making an impact, and never bored.
Our culture is grounded in a set of core values that guide how we show up for our clients, our teammates, and our communities.

Want to work with some of the best global talent and build software used by all the companies you know and love? Join the team — we’re hiring! If you like being on the cutting edge of technology innovation, and you want to be on a winning team, then let’s make it happen!
Complete an application and upload your resume to our Talent Pool to be considered for future openings!

pages.title: Training - Capitalize Analytics
pages.description: Expert-led training to help teams build skills in analytics, automation, and AI—designed to drive adoption, confidence, and real outcomes., Expert-led training to help teams build skills in analytics, automation, and AI—designed to drive adoption, confidence, and real outcomes.

headings.text: Training & Mentoring That Turns Software Investment Into Real ROI
Equip your team to master the tools you’ve invested in—and build lasting expertise that drives measurable business outcomes.
Not Sure Where To Start? We Can Help.
Talk to a Training & Mentoring Advisor
Talk to a Training & Analytics Expert

body_copy: Hands-on, practical training designed to help your team move from learning the tools to delivering real business value.
Workflow-driven learning – Build end-to-end Alteryx workflows focused on real data preparation, blending, and analytics use cases.
Hands-on problem solving – Instructor-led exercises and workshops using realistic scenarios to reinforce best practices and performance optimization.
Scalable expertise – Develop internal capability to automate analytics processes, reduce manual effort, and deliver repeatable insights.
Foundational to advanced skills – From core visualization concepts to advanced calculations, dashboards, and performance tuning.
Best-practice design – Learn how to create clear, intuitive, and impactful dashboards that drive decision-making—not confusion.
Real-world application – Hands-on labs using practical datasets to ensure dashboards are immediately usable in your environment.

Our proven training methodology has been tested across hundreds of clients and every platform we support. The result: faster adoption, stronger solutions, and teams that move from “learning” to “leading.”
We assemble the most relevant vendor content, videos, documentation, and exercises to give your team a strong foundation.
Participants arrive with baseline knowledge, allowing live training to focus on application instead of fundamentals.
Ensures everyone starts from the same place, regardless of prior experience.
Instructor-led classes with demos, workshops, and guided exercises to build practical skills.
~100 pages of printed and bound content per course, including screenshots, data, starter files, and solution files.
Onsite or remote options, public or private courses, and fully customized classes using your data and systems.
Sessions focus on the actual challenges your team is facing, not hypothetical examples.
We work alongside your team to design, refine, and implement solutions while transferring knowledge throughout.
Clients typically see 3–5x more output compared to working alone, rapidly advancing toward independence.
Access experienced consultants when your team gets stuck or needs a second opinion.
From short troubleshooting calls to extended coaching sessions.
Reinforces skills, improves solution quality, and ensures your team never feels blocked by the technology.
We’ll start with a short conversation to understand your current challenges and outline where a focused assessment or strategy engagement could deliver the fastest impact.

Organizations routinely invest heavily in software, yet struggle to realize its full value because teams lack the confidence, experience, or real-world guidance to apply it effectively. Training that’s too generic, rushed, or disconnected from day-to-day work leaves users stuck and investments underutilized.
Faster adoption: Teams gain confidence quickly, accelerating platform usage and shortening time-to-value from new technology investments.
Higher-quality solutions: Proper enablement reduces mistakes, rework, and fragile builds, resulting in solutions that scale and last.
Lasting internal expertise: Your team develops the skills to own, evolve, and support solutions independently — reducing long-term reliance on external resources.

Our approach blends structured instruction with real-world mentoring, using the same proven methods our consultants apply every day. The result is practical, durable skill development that directly impacts productivity and ROI.
Consultants, not instructors: Your trainers are experienced practitioners who design, build, and support analytics solutions — not professional lecturers reading slides.
Real-world focus: We train using real data, real workflows, and real challenges so skills transfer immediately into your environment.
Proven methodology: Our four-phase approach has been refined across hundreds of clients and multiple platforms, delivering consistent outcomes.
Flexible and tailored: Onsite or remote, standard or custom, training, mentoring, or ongoing support—we design programs around your goals, not a fixed curriculum.
Measured impact: Clients routinely see 3–5x productivity gains during mentoring sessions and faster time-to-value from their technology investments.
A collaborative, flexible approach designed around your team, your technology, and your goals.
We start by understanding your tools, team skill levels, business objectives, and timelines to design the right mix of training, mentoring, and support.
Instruction is hands-on, practical, and tailored to real use cases, ensuring skills translate immediately into day-to-day work.
Through mentoring and ongoing support, we help your team apply what they’ve learned, refine solutions, and build long-term confidence.
Get guidance on the right mix of training, mentoring, and ongoing support.
→ Schedule a 30-Minute Complimentary Assessment

pages.title: Accounting - Capitalize Analytics
pages.description: Analytics consulting for accounting teams to optimize close processes, reduce manual work, and unlock actionable financial insights., Analytics consulting for accounting teams to optimize close processes, reduce manual work, and unlock actionable financial insights.

headings.text: Accounting Is Always on the Clock
Why Are So Many Accounting Teams Still Living in Excel?
What We Do for Accounting Teams
Deep Accounting Experience You Can Count On
Not sure where to start? Here are two fast, low-risk ways.
Managed Services Designed for Modern Accounting Teams
Let Capitalize Run Your Platforms — So You Can Run the Business.

[Transforming Banking with UiPath: Enhancing Risk Management and Accounting Accuracy](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/webinars/transforming-banking-with-uipath-enhancing-risk-management-and-accounting-accuracy/)
[“AI” to ROI in 45 Days – \ \ Less Hype. More Help.](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/webinars/client-roundtable-how-are-tax-accounting-and-audit-teams-automating-manual-processes-and-reporting/)

[Drive your Automation Journey with \ \ Alteryx and Capitalize’s Office of Finance Blueprint](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/webinars/drive-your-automation-journey-with-alteryx-and-capitalizes-office-of-finance-blueprint/)

body_copy: Capitalize helps accounting and finance teams automate reconciliations, consolidations, and reporting so they can hit every deadline with confidence, without burning out in the process.

Month-end, quarter-end, year-end — those dates don’t move. Invoices must be sent. Paychecks must go out. Taxes and regulatory filings must be flawless. Executives, boards, auditors, and sometimes the SEC or shareholders are waiting on numbers that have to be right.
A missed reconciliation can mean misstated financials.
A typo in a tax or payroll file can create penalties or compliance issues.
Manual workarounds make it harder to explain or defend the numbers.
Delays in processing create ripple effects throughout the organization.
Meanwhile, the expectations keep rising, but the tools often don’t.

Most accounting teams work across multiple systems that don’t talk to each other. Because these systems don’t fully integrate or don’t meet all accounting needs, teams are forced to build “off-system” processes — usually in Excel.
The result? Endless spreadsheets, fragile formulas, manual copy/paste, and late nights at close.
No technology will replace accountants, but the right technology will replace a huge portion of this manual, repetitive work.
We help accounting teams replace fragile Excel workarounds with automated, repeatable, and auditable processes powered by modern data and analytics tools like Power BI, Alteryx, andSnowflake.
Automate reconciliations and consolidations
Produce accurate, timely reporting for every stakeholder
Reduce risk and reliance on key-person Excel knowledge
We design and implement practical, finance-friendly solutions that reduce manual work and increase confidence in the numbers.
Automate recurring entries, eliminations, and allocations so your team isn’t rebuilding them every period.
Standardize close checklists and workflows across entities to create a consistent, repeatable process.
Deliver faster, more consistent month-end, quarter-end, and year-end closes without the last-minute scramble.
Automate matching between GL, subledgers, bank files, and external systems to cut down manual comparisons.
Flag exceptions proactively so your team can focus on resolving issues, not hunting for them.
Improve audit readiness with clear, repeatable reconciliation logic and an auditable process trail.
Integrate ERP/GL, billing, CRM, HR/payroll, and expense systems into a unified financial data ecosystem.
Training and certification: upskill users and admins so more of the organization can confidently self-serve.
Eliminate or reduce manual file exports, imports, and spreadsheet stitching with automated data pipelines.
Build self-service dashboards in tools like Power BI so leaders can access the numbers they need, when they need them.
Standardize financial and management reporting to ensure everyone is working from the same version of the truth.
Refresh data automatically so reports don’t need to be rebuilt from scratch every month.
Explore where managed services can relieve the most pressure and create the most impact for your team.
A focused ideation conversation where we map your current reality — firefights, bottlenecks, and wish-list improvements.
Clarify What to Hand Off: Identify which platform tasks drain the most time and should shift to a managed partner.
Spot High-Impact Opportunities: Surface the areas where proactive monitoring, optimization, or transformation would deliver the biggest win.
Shape a Potential Model: Walk away with a clearer sense of what a right-sized managed services engagement could include for you.
Understand how ready you are for managed services — and where you stand to gain the most.
Reveal Hidden Risks: See where your current support approach leaves you vulnerable to outages, performance issues, or key-person dependencies.
Quantify the Strain: Understand how much effort your team is spending on “keeping the lights on” versus strategic work.
Highlight Value Levers: Pinpoint the areas (KTLO, continuous improvement, or transformation) where managed services could create the fastest impact.

If you’re in accounting and routinely spend more than 25 minutes on a recurring task in Excel — reconciliations, consolidations, report prep, data cleanup — there’s a very good chance it can be automated.
We combine steady, reliable support with proactive guidance so your platforms keep improving — not just staying online.
We start by learning your platforms, current pain points, and what “good” looks like for your teams. Together, we align on scope, responsibilities, and the right service tier.
We put monitoring, processes, and SLAs in place to reduce noise and risk. From there, we standardize how changes move through environments and automate wherever possible.
Once the lights are reliably on, we shift focus to continuous improvement and transformation — finding new ways to increase adoption, performance, and business value.
Tell us how you’re supporting your analytics and automation platforms today, and we’ll show you how we can reduce risk, free up your team, and unlock more value.
Schedule a 30-minute complimentary Accounting Automations review.
Hear insights on using agents to transform repetitive tasks like invoice processing, financial reporting, and compliance verification into efficient, real-time operations.
A practical blueprint for turning “AI” from a buzzword into a business plan that actually works. Take advantage of the special offer at the end of the webinar to get started.
Streamline your finance operations with Alteryx and Capitalize’s Office of Finance Blueprint! Automate tasks, boost efficiency, and make smarter decisions.

pages.title: What We Do - Capitalize Analytics
pages.description: Learn how we help organizations turn data into smarter decisions with analytics, automation, and integration that drive real, measurable business impact.

headings.text: Unleashing the Power of Data Analytics for Strategic Excellence

body_copy: We help organizations turn data into smarter decisions through analytics, automation, and AI. Our team designs, builds, and supports modern data solutions that drive measurable business outcomes.

We implement individualized analytics solutions and deliver high-impact solutions that produce exceptional results. As a leading provider of Business Intelligence solutions and consulting services, we bring together industry knowledge and management best practices provide a winning combination for our clients.

It all began when we saw the need to provide an inspired technical vision to customer and not just a software product. Our philosophy is that each and every client is unique, therefore the approach must be also. We don’t adhere to a “one-size fits all” or “blanket approach” to help you solve complex problems or make complex decisions.

As a leading provider of Business Intelligence solutions and consulting services, we empower you to make better decisions. We bring together industry knowledge and management best practices to provide a winning combination for our clients. Our wealth of knowledge about the various solutions available for your industry is specifically applied for your situation.

We understand how difficult change can be for your employees, organizational structure and daily operations so we collaborate with your senior leadership team, outline a strategy to effectively implement the needed changes and communicate with your staff to achieve early wins and continued cooperation. Our experience allows us to share solid advice and alternatives to improve your processes.
We work across a wide range of industries, applying proven analytics, automation, and AI expertise to solve each organization’s unique business challenges.
We help organizations turn disconnected data, manual processes, and scattered tools into a connected analytics ecosystem that drives smarter decisions every day.
[](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/ai-and-advanced-analytics/)
We design and deploy practical AI and advanced analytics solutions that turn your data into predictions, recommendations, and always-on decision support.
[](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/business-intelligence/)
We design and deliver intuitive, self-service BI dashboards and reports that give your teams real-time visibility into performance and empower faster, data-driven decisions.
[](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/data-strategy-advisory/)
We build clear, actionable data strategies that align technology, governance, and analytics with your business goals and KPIs.
[](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/data-engineering-integration/)
We architect and implement modern data platforms and pipelines that deliver trusted, high-quality data to the right people and systems, at the right time.
[](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/process-automation/)
We automate manual, spreadsheet-driven processes so your teams can focus on high-value work while your workflows run reliably in the background.
[](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/managed-services/)
We provide ongoing support, optimization, and enhancement of your analytics, data, and automation solutions so they stay healthy, secure, and continuously improving.
[](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/training/)
We offer practical, customized training to help teams successfully adopt and scale AI, analytics, and automation technologies.

We assess the health and performance of your Alteryx environment and deliver actionable recommendations to optimize performance, reduce risk, and ensure your Alteryx platform is delivering maximum value.
Our Alteryx Managed Services deliver proactive support and optimization so your team can focus on insights while we handle the platform.
Our Alteryx Lifecycle Governance defines version control, promotion processes, access controls, and deployment standards to manage workflows across development, test, and production environments.
Whether you’re exploring AI, automating workflows, or modernizing your data environment, our team is here to help you find the right path forward.
Tell us what you’re working on and we’ll show you how Capitalize can accelerate results.

pages.title: Managed Services - Capitalize Analytics

headings.text: Managed Services that Keep Your Analytics Running
Not sure where to start? Two fast, low-risk ways.
Reduce Platform Risk Without Overloading Your Team
A Managed Services Model That Adapts As You Grow
A Managed Services Model Built Around Your Business
Let Capitalize Run Your Platforms — So You Can Run the Business.

body_copy: Capitalize provides managed services for your analytics and automation platforms — keeping them healthy, secure, and evolving so your teams can focus on decisions, not downtime.
Explore where managed services can relieve the most pressure and create the most impact for your team.
A focused ideation conversation where we map your current reality — firefights, bottlenecks, and wish-list improvements.
Clarify What to Hand Off: Identify which platform tasks drain the most time and should shift to a managed partner.
Spot High-Impact Opportunities: Surface the areas where proactive monitoring, optimization, or transformation would deliver the biggest wins.
Shape a Potential Model: Walk away with a clearer sense of what a right-sized managed services engagement could include for you.
Understand how ready you are for managed services — and where you stand to gain the most.
Reveal Hidden Risks: See where your current support approach leaves you vulnerable to outages, performance issues, or key-person dependencies.
Quantify the Strain: Understand how much effort your team is spending on “keeping the lights on” versus strategic work.
Highlight Value Levers: Pinpoint the areas (KTLO, continuous improvement, or transformation) where managed services could create the fastest impact.
Get help exactly where you need it — from targeted support in one area to a fully customized managed services package.
Server setup, patching, and annual upgrades: keep environments current and supported.
Onboarding/offboarding: manage licenses, permissions, and collections so the right people have the right access.
Platform monitoring and outage support: detect issues early and respond quickly when things go wrong.
Ideation & intake: capture, vet, and prioritize improvement requests from the business.
SDLC phase management: manage changes through dev, test, and prod with automated deployments between environments.
Active job monitoring and demand forecasting: identify bottlenecks and tune workloads before they impact users.
Customer-managed telemetry and desktop usage dashboards: understand who’s using what, and where value is created.
Training and certification: upskill users and admins so more of the organization can confidently self-serve.
Configurauration revie/recommendations: aligns settings, standards, and governance with best practices.
Migration targets from designer to server: move critical assets to scalable, governed environments.
Transformation planning: identify opportunities to consolidate platforms, modernize architecture, and introduce new capabilities.
Guided rollout and communication: help stakeholders adopt new ways of working as your environment evolves.
Tell us how you’re supporting your analytics and automation platforms today, and we’ll show you how managed services can reduce risk, free up your team, and unlock more value.
With Capitalize Managed Services, you get a dedicated team that proactively maintains and tunes your environment so your business can depend on it.
Fewer Fire Drills: Cut down on unplanned outages, broken dashboards, and last-minute scrambles that derail your team’s day.
Stronger Platform Health: Improve stability, performance, and security with consistent monitoring, patching, and best-practice configuration.
Time Back for High-Value Work: Free your internal team from routine support tasks so they can focus on strategy, innovation, and partnering with the business.
Our approach to managed services is intentionally flexible. As your environment and priorities change, your managed services model changes with you.
Right-Sized Engagement: Choose the level of coverage and involvement that fits your current team capacity, budget, and risk tolerance.
Clear Rhythm of Collaboration: Work within a predictable cadence of check-ins, reviews, and planning sessions tailored to your organization.
Pathway to Transformation: Use managed services as a foundation to drive bigger initiatives like modernization, migrations, and new platform capabilities.
We combine steady, reliable support with proactive guidance so your platforms keep improving — not just staying online.
We start by learning your platforms, current pain points, and what “good” looks like for your teams. Together, we align on scope, responsibilities, and the right service tier.
We put monitoring, processes, and SLAs in place to reduce noise and risk. From there, we standardize how changes move through environments and automate wherever possible.
Once the lights are reliably on, we shift focus to continuous improvement and transformation — finding new ways to increase adoption, performance, and business value.
Schedule a 30-minute complimentary Managed Services review

pages.title: Tableau Training - Capitalize Analytics
pages.description: Expert-led Tableau training to improve data visualization, dashboard design, and analytics adoption., Expert-led Tableau training to improve data visualization, dashboard design, and analytics adoption.
body_copy: Tableau training is an important milestone in your analytics journey. Our approach to Tableau training and enablement consists of four phases, each successive phase building from one another. Many companies and individuals are interested in earning the Tableau Certifications. Our training path is designed to help you pass the Tableau Desktop Specialist Certification. Our phased approach includes:
1. Tableau Desktop: Fundamentals of Analysis
2. Tableau Desktop: Intermediate Analysis
4. Tableau Server: Managing and Administering Tableau Content

Tableau provides 1000+ hours of free video content that explores a wide variety of topics from setting data connections to administering Tableau Server. Before you pay to have professional trainers execute a Tableau training program, it is highly recommended that you or your team review the free Tableau video tutorials. In addition, Tableau touts an enthusiastic and helpful community of users, where ideas can be shared, and questions can be answered.

In our experience, nothing can replace formal Tableau training with a live instructor. Whether you choose to do these trainings remotely or onsite, our trainers can gauge the audience and ensure the class is learning the skills they’ll need to be successful with Tableau. Our instructors increase or decrease the pace of the class based on the individuals in the class, cover skills multiple times if the concepts prove difficult for participants, and have years of consulting experience to reference. Hearing how others have used Tableau in the “real world” can bridge knowledge gaps that training exercises may not.

Our formal Tableau training classes also come with printed and bound materials. On average, we’ll provide approximately 100 pages of materials for each day of training containing demos, workshops, and screenshots to guide the participant every step of the way. We also provide data, starting points, and solutions so that attendees can refresh skills later, as needed.

Tableau mentoring allows users to create complex analytical content, with the assistance of an expert. Mentoring sessions are focused on real challenges and use cases that the attendee needs to complete. These one-on-one or small group sessions use the same methodology our consultants use to solve everyday challenges. That includes:
1. Holistic examination of the current process and challenges
2. Consideration of process improvements throughout
3. Building a solution together step-by-step to ensure knowledge transfer is ongoing and complete
4. Recap of the solution looking for ways to improve
5. Implementation of the final solution for long term use

Professional tennis players still have coaches. Your team needs someone to call when they get stuck, come across a situation they’ve never seen, or want an expert to look over their solutions. Our ongoing support programs give your team a group of experts to call whenever they need guidance and advice. Whether they need 30 minutes of assistance troubleshooting a formula, or hours of coaching on a large analytic project, our consultants will be here to help.
Interface Navigation | Calculations | Maps
Connecting to Data Sources | Focusing Data | Basic Formatting
Understanding Data Types | Creating Charts and Managing Basic Properties | Analytics in Tableau

The goal of Tableau Fundamental is to create a solid base on Tableau fundamentals by learning the interface navigation, creating, and configuring basic visualizations, and creating a base of knowledge around data types. No prerequisites are required!

The goal of Tableau Intermediate is to build upon the fundamental Tableau course by incorporating dashboarding, statistical modeling, and advanced Tableau functionality, thus creating a robust skill set that allows users to create dynamic and visually appealing graphics. Tableau Fundamental Course is a prerequisite.
Advanced Charting and Storytelling | Basics of Statistical Modeling in Tableau | Preparing your Data
Advanced Calculations and Customization | Advanced Mapping | Data Blending
Understanding Parameters | Creating and Using Input Controls

The goal of Tableau Advanced is to enhance the fundamental skills by incorporating powerful interactivity between visualizations, advanced dashboarding techniques, data mining, and a deep understanding of how calculations work and when to use them. Tableau Fundamental and Intermediate Course completion is a prerequisite.
Refresher | Data Mining | Powerful Interactivity
Advanced Dashboarding | Creating a Story | Calculation Deep Dive
Level of Detail Calculations | Creating and Using Groups

If centralization and governance is at the forefront of mind for your company, this course will propel your understanding of how Server works and how to manage Tableau Server by managing users/groups, content, permissions.

pages.title: Dave Giang - Capitalize Analytics
body_copy: Dave’s experience lies in implementing IT/Accounting projects, enhancing reporting/dashboarding capabilities, and bridging the gap between IT and the business. His expertise is within midstream oil and gas but has experience in different facets of IT and Accounting from acquisitions, divestitures, project management, interfacing applications and handling client accounts.

Through his six years of industry experience, Dave has managed a variety of projects, implemented a diverse set of software, supported custom legacy and COTS applications, developed solutions to replace proprietary applications, and created custom reports utilizing a wide range of reporting tools. He has used his understanding of data to bring value to customers and his experience in various roles allows him to understand the landscape of IT and how to improve the day-to-day lives of end users. His project management and communication skills allow him to deliver projects in a timely manner and serve as the point of contact to key stakeholders.

Dave joined Capitalize in 2020 as a Consultant within the Midstream sector. Prior to Capitalize, Dave spent 3 years at Targa Resources where he experienced role rotation across departments, giving him a diverse background and broad range of expertise. This includes application support, reporting and analytics within IT, and functional support within business. In these roles, he has implemented software, spearheaded and managed projects, acted as the liaison across departments, and used data to improve business processes. He has upgraded and implemented new assets into W Energy and developed new functionalities and interfaces such as GPEX within W Energy. Dave has implemented data warehousing strategies for big data and built Power BI reports to turn large amounts of data into easily digestible information. He has developed tools within Alteryx to replace custom applications, optimize workflows, and reduce manual efforts.
Dave’s experience within both IT and business allows him to better understand the full-scale needs of an organization and deliver value to his clients.

body_copy: Eric Soden is an analytics professional with more than 20 years of experience in management, technical presales, business analysis, enterprise reporting/analytics, data warehousing, and project management. He has served as a director of consulting services, solutions architect, vendor partner, trainer, and customer. His proven abilities in selling and implementing technical solutions in the private and public sectors help show management teams the value of business intelligence in solving real-world problems.

pages.title: Process Automation - Capitalize Analytics
pages.description: Process automation consulting to streamline workflows, reduce manual effort, and accelerate business outcomes with intelligent automation., Process automation consulting to streamline workflows, reduce manual effort, and accelerate business outcomes with intelligent automation.

headings.text: Streamline Processes. Eliminate Bottlenecks. Maximize Efficiency.
Not sure where to start? Here are two fast, low-risk options.
Automate the Pain Points Slowing Down Your Business
Stop Wasting Time on What Doesn’t Add Value
Your Partner in Smarter, Faster Operations

body_copy: At Capitalize, we help organizations automate repetitive, error-prone tasks so teams can focus on higher-value work. From workflow automation to advanced analytics integration, our experts design solutions that reduce costs, increase accuracy, and accelerate decision-making across your business.
We use short, outcome-focused engagements to uncover value and de-risk your BI roadmap.
Find the hidden costs of manual work — and where automation will hit hardest. We analyze your end-to-end processes to identify repetitive, error-prone, and time-consuming tasks.
You’ll receive a clear, data-backed roadmap showing:
Which processes to automate first for the highest ROI
A phased rollout plan tied to measurable business outcomes
Document data sources, manual steps, and governance; visualize a future-state BI architecture with an agile rollout plan.
Data model & semantic layer recommendations
Manual processes, disconnected systems, and outdated workflows hold teams back.
Capitalize helps you eliminate inefficiencies and create lasting impact through four key automation capabilities — built to deliver measurable results fast.
Align BI initiatives with business strategy and technology investments.
Equip business users to explore data safely and effectively.
Establish best practices for data definitions, access, and visualization consistency.
Design enterprise-ready dashboards using Power BI, Tableau, or your platform of choice.
Enable users to explore data independently while maintaining governance.
Define and visualize the metrics that matter most to your organization.
Design clean, efficient data models that ensure speed and accuracy in reporting.
Bring together data from ERP, CRM, financial, and operational systems into one trusted view.
Develop flexible structures that evolve with your analytics maturity.
Build intuitive dashboards that make complex information easy to digest.
Craft data stories that highlight insights, trends, and next steps.
Tailor dashboards and reports for executives, analysts, and operational teams.
Meet with our expert to review your current state and identify the fastest path to trusted, actionable insights.
Most organizations know automation is powerful — they just don’t know where to start.
With Capitalize’s process automation services, you can:
Automate manual reporting and data entry across departments
Integrate disconnected systems for seamless data flow
Reduce errors and rework through rule-based automation
Empower business users to build and manage their own workflows
Free up IT resources for more strategic initiatives
The result? A leaner, faster, more connected business.
Automation isn’t just about technology — it’s about transformation.
At Capitalize, we’ve helped organizations:
Eliminate thousands of manual hours per year
Empower teams to focus on insight, innovation, and impact
Our consultants partner with you every step of the way — from identifying automation opportunities to implementing solutions and enabling adoption.
We don’t drop bots and hope for the best — we build automation that lasts.
Our method delivers impact fast while laying the groundwork for long-term scale.

We start by identifying where your people are losing time and where your processes are breaking down. Through workshops and process mining, we map the hidden manual work — the copy-paste tasks, the delays, the exceptions — and quantify the cost of doing nothing.

Next, we target the highest-impact automations and get them live fast. We use platforms like UiPath, Alteryx, and Power Automate to eliminate friction and deliver measurable time savings in weeks — not months. Every automation is built for visibility, control, and scalability.

Once results are proven, we scale automation responsibly. We establish governance, training, and Centers of Excellence so your team can sustain momentum and expand automation safely across the enterprise. The outcome: a faster, leaner, more resilient organization that runs on intelligence — not manual effort.
We’ll help you identify high-impact automation opportunities and deliver measurable business outcomes.
Schedule a Free Process Automation Consultation.

pages.title: Andrew Trettel - Capitalize Analytics
body_copy: Andrew Trettel is a skilled Certified Public Accountant and the driving force behind Capitalize’s Office of Finance Transformation Practice. With over a decade of experience gained at a prominent public accounting firm, Andrew has honed his expertise in financial processes and emerged as a trailblazer in digital transformation.

At Capitalize, Andrew leads a dynamic team of subject matter and technology experts, dedicated to streamlining and enhancing finance and accounting operations for clients spanning diverse industries. Drawing upon their profound technical acumen and specialized domain knowledge, Andrew and his team excel at orchestrating comprehensive solutions that optimize efficiency and deliver invaluable insights. Their visionary perspective allows them to craft time-saving strategies and harness industry-leading software to elevate client outcomes.

Throughout his career, Andrew has harnessed the power of data analytics to unlock exceptional value in consulting engagements. His portfolio includes overseeing substantial Alteryx implementations and spearheading governance and compliance strategies. Andrew also served as the functional lead on developing the Capitalize Office of Finance Blueprint – a groundbreaking resource empowering business users to embark on their analytics journey across Accounting, Audit, Tax, and other departments within the Office of Finance.

Andrew’s diverse portfolio showcases his ability to perform procedures and design tailored solutions for various industries, including manufacturing, retail, transportation, automotive, technology, investment, real estate holding entities, and construction.
He earned his BA in Accounting from Washington & Jefferson College, cementing the foundation of his extensive expertise and commitment to excellence.

pages.title: Jonathan Couch - Capitalize Analytics
body_copy: Jonathan has 20 years of experience in the energy industry guiding industry-leading companies in optimizing system efficiencies, reducing costs, and surpassing business objectives. With expertise in gas plant accounting, management consulting, and cutting-edge technologies, he is dedicated to driving efficiency and leveraging innovation for the success of energy companies.

Jonathan is an information technology consultant with a 20-year track record of delivering solutions, fostering innovation, and devising tactical plans to enhance the daily operations of large-scale enterprises in the energy industry. With a comprehensive background encompassing software implementation and support, project management, management consulting, staff augmentation, and asset acquisitions/dispositions, Jonathan has consistently demonstrated his ability to drive impactful results.

Jonathan has expertise in gas plant accounting configuration and processes, particularly in Quorum Software’s gathering system and gas plant accounting solution (Quorum TIPS). He has played a pivotal role in guiding business decisions and providing valuable subject matter expertise to industry-leading companies such as DCP Midstream, Pioneer Natural Resources, Energy Transfer, Marathon Petroleum, and others.

Prior to joining Capitalize, Jonathan spent 17 years as a professional consultant at Quorum Software, where he developed an extensive functional understanding of the midstream energy space. His hands-on experience spans natural gas gathering, transportation, storage, and product refinement. During his tenure at Quorum, Jonathan successfully led multiple implementations of Quorum’s product suite.
Jonathan earned his BBA in Management and Economics, and his MBA in Finance at Texas Tech University.

headings.text: Business Intelligence That Powers Confident Decisions
Not sure where to start? Here are two fast, low-risk ways.
Transform Your Data into Clarity, Confidence, and Action
When You Can’t Trust the Data, You Can’t Run the Business
We Fix the Foundation So BI Finally Delivers Value
Let’s Make Your BI Work as Hard as You Do
[Supercharging Power BI: Harnessing the Power of ChatGPT for Advanced Data Visualization and Analysis](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/power-bi-chatgpt-for-advanced-data-visualization-and-analysis/)
[Power BI Finance Dashboard: Integrating Financial Data with Microsoft Power BI](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/power-bi-finance-dashboard/)
[Tools of the Trade: Which BI Tool Is Best?](https://capitalizeconsulting.com/tools-of-the-trade-which-bi-tool-is-best/)

body_copy: Capitalize helps organizations design modern business intelligence solutions that turn complex data into actionable insight. We combine technical expertise with business strategy to deliver dashboards, reports, and analytics that drive smarter, faster decisions.
We use short, outcome-focused engagements to uncover value and de-risk your BI roadmap.
Align leaders on current reporting pain, define success metrics, and rank 5–10 high-impact dashboard and automation opportunities.
• Rapid pain mapping: close, revenue, ops KPIs
• Value vs. effort matrix to pick quick wins
• Executive-ready summary within 48 hours
Document data sources, manual steps, and governance. Visualize a future-state BI architecture with an agile rollout plan.
Data model & semantic layer recommendations
Capitalize delivers end-to-end business intelligence services that connect strategy, technology, and storytelling — ensuring your data works as hard as you do.
Align BI initiatives with business strategy and technology investments.
Equip business users to explore data effectively within a structured governance
Establish best practices for data definitions, access, and visualization consistency.
Design enterprise-ready dashboards using Power BI, Tableau, or your platform of choice.
Enable users to explore data independently while maintaining governance.
Define and visualize the metrics that matter most to your organization.
Design clean, efficient data models that ensure speed and accuracy in reporting.
Bring together data from ERP, CRM, financial, and operational systems into one trusted view.
Develop flexible structures that evolve with your analytics maturity.
Build intuitive dashboards that make complex information easy to digest.
Craft data stories that highlight insights, trends, and next steps.
Tailor dashboards and reports for executives, analysts, and operational teams.
Meet with our team of BI architects to review your current state and identify the fastest path to trusted, actionable insights.
Bad or inconsistent data doesn’t just frustrate teams — it drives costly mistakes:
Slow decisions that let competitors move first
If every meeting starts with “Where did this number come from?” you don’t have Business Intelligence — you have business confusion.
Capitalize Analytics helps organizations turn underperforming BI environments into engines of clarity and confidence.
Our experts uncover what’s really holding your BI back — data quality, governance gaps, adoption challenges, or architecture issues — then build a practical plan to fix it.
Eliminate manual reporting and reconciliation with automation.
Unify metrics and data sources for one version of the truth.
Modernize outdated dashboards into governed self-service analytics.
Increase adoption so insights drive decisions, not debates.
We start by identifying what’s working, what isn’t, and why. Then we design and deliver business intelligence solutions that bring clarity, consistency, and confidence to decision-making.

We expose what’s really holding your BI back — fragmented data, manual reporting, or poor governance. Through focused interviews and process mapping, we reveal the inefficiencies draining productivity and trust. You’ll see exactly where the issues are, why they persist, and how much they’re costing your business.

Next, we architect a smarter BI ecosystem that actually works and is built around your people, processes, and priorities. We validate the vision through quick wins and proofs of concept that demonstrate measurable value fast. Expect to see automation replace manual effort, data align across systems, and dashboards finally tell the same story everywhere.

We implement, train, and optimize so your success lasts. Governance, adoption, and change management are part of the process, not an afterthought. The result: data you trust, decisions you accelerate, and a culture that runs on insight.
Ready to see where your analytics are leaking value?
Schedule a BI Health Check. In just a few hours, we’ll show you what’s broken — and what fixing it could unlock.
In this video, we will see how we can use ChatGPT to analyze and document applied steps in the Power Query Editor.

We will explore how best-in-class organizations across the utility sector use automation to optimize processes and operations, from generation and transmission to customer service and back office support.
As consultants, we are always being asked “Which tool should I use for BI/Analytics?” For better or worse, the answer isn’t simple.

pages.description: Data strategy and advisory services to align your data initiatives with business goals, strengthen governance, and enable better decision-making., Data strategy and advisory services to align your data initiatives with business goals, strengthen governance, and enable better decision-making.

headings.text: Stop Fighting Spreadsheets and Silos.   Start Running on a Real Data Strategy.
Not Sure Where To Start? We Can Help.
Build a Data Foundation That Drives Smarter Decisions
Talk to a Data Strategy Advisor
Why Data Strategy Before the Next Dashboard or Tool
We Don’t Just Advise — We Partner for Success

body_copy: Capitalize helps finance, operations, and IT leaders build a practical, business-first data strategy so you can trust your numbers, automate the busywork, and move faster — with the platforms you already own and the ones you plan to invest in.
Whether you’re exploring what’s possible or ready to prove value fast, we’ll help you take the first step toward building your data foundation.
You can’t design a better future if you don’t have a clear picture of today. Our assessment gives you an honest, business-first view of how data really flows across your organization.
We will help you align on the KPIs that matter, rationalize reports, and design a phased roadmap to modernize analytics, self-service, and governance.

Capitalize helps organizations design and execute strategies that turn data into a measurable business advantage. Our advisory offerings are built to meet you where you are — aligning your people, processes, and technology to deliver real outcomes.
Evaluate your analytics landscape to uncover gaps, inefficiencies, and opportunities for improvement.
Define a clear data vision and action plan aligned with business priorities and measurable ROI.
Establish KPIs and governance standards to track performance and ensure sustainable growth.
Review workflows and operations to pinpoint inefficiencies that automation can solve.
Quantify savings, productivity gains, and potential ROI to focus on high-impact opportunities.
Outline phased, achievable steps for deploying automation tools like Alteryx and Power Automate.
Create flexible, future-ready data architectures — cloud, hybrid, or on-prem.
Define consistent data definitions and access protocols to boost confidence and usability.
Develop policies and standards that ensure data accuracy, security, and compliance.
Partner with business leaders to identify data-driven use cases with strategic impact.
Rank initiatives by feasibility, ROI, and alignment to corporate goals.
Translate insights into concrete, ready-to-execute projects that deliver measurable results.
We’ll start with a short conversation to understand your current challenges and outline where a focused assessment or strategy engagement could deliver the fastest impact.

Most organizations jump straight into tools — new warehouses, new BI platforms, new automation — without solving the underlying data and process issues. That’s how you end up with expensive tech, low adoption, and the same old problems in a prettier interface.
More Tools, Same Chaos: New platforms get layered on top of old ones, creating faster silos instead of unified, trusted data.
Shadow Analytics Everywhere: Business users build their own reports and logic because they don’t trust the “official” numbers or can’t get what they need.
POCs That Never Scale: Impressive pilots stall out because nobody defined ownership, governance, or a path to production and adoption.
Capitalize works side-by-side with your teams to ensure alignment, adoption, and long-term impact. Our advisory model is built on collaboration, transparency, and practical implementation.
Business & IT Alignment: We connect technical execution with strategic priorities to drive organization-wide adoption.
Knowledge Transfer: We empower your teams with the frameworks and skills to maintain momentum after engagement.
Tailored Roadmaps: Every recommendation is actionable, realistic, and specific to your organization’s maturity.
We’re not here to sell you another tool. We’re here to make the tools you have — and the ones you’re considering — actually deliver business value.

We start with focused conversations with key stakeholders in finance, operations, IT, and analytics to understand how decisions are made today. This gives us a clear picture of your priorities, constraints, and what “better” really needs to look like for your business.

Next, we dive into your processes, data flows, and platforms through working sessions and hands-on reviews. We document where the bottlenecks, manual workarounds, and data quality issues are actually happening — not just where they show up on a slide.

We then synthesize what we’ve learned into a practical data and analytics strategy, along with a target-state architecture and operating model. This becomes the playbook that links technology decisions to real use cases, owners, and business outcomes.

From there, we build a phased roadmap that balances long-term direction with near-term impact. We highlight high-value, low-risk initiatives that can be delivered quickly to prove the approach, build credibility, and fund the next steps.

When it makes sense, we stand up pilots or MVP solutions using your existing tools to show what “good” looks like in your environment. These pilots validate assumptions, surface change-management needs, and create concrete examples your teams can rally around.

As you execute, our experts stay close to help you adjust the plan, remove blockers, and prioritize new opportunities. We act as a long-term partner — guiding governance, adoption, and continuous improvement so your data strategy doesn’t stall after the first phase.
Get an objective view of your data, reporting, and analytics landscape with clear priorities for improvement.
→ Schedule a 30-Minute Complimentary Assessment

headings.text: Upgrade Your Workforce Analytics So HR Can Lead, Not Just Report
HR & Workforce Analytics: Big Expectations, Messy Data

Why HR & Workforce Analytics Leaders Choose Capitalize

body_copy: Capitalize helps HR and Workforce Analytics Teams securely automate time consuming data prep, reporting, and data visualizations – so you can quickly answer tough questions about talent, retention, and cost without pulling all-nighters in Excel.
Human resources, workforce analytics, and HRIS teams carry a huge range of responsibilities — and an even wider range of data sources.
On any given day, you’re asked to answer:
How are we doing on talent acquisition and time-to-fill?
Where are we at risk on turnover and retention?
How are compensation and pay equity trending across roles and locations?
What can we do to cut costs without hurting performance or culture?

The questions aren’t getting simpler, the volume of data isn’t shrinking, and expectations definitely aren’t getting lower. HR teams need analytics that can keep up with constant requests, complex data sources, and fast decision cycles while maintaining data privacy.
Unified people data: Bring together information from ATS, HRIS, payroll, LMS, performance, engagement, and survey tools into a single, trusted view.
Automated reporting: Replace recurring manual reports and dashboards with automated, refreshable outputs that reduce fire drills and human error.
Advanced insight & “what ifs”: Support predictive and scenario analysis — like attrition risk, hiring needs, and workforce planning — without rebuilding everything in Excel.

Capitalize helps HR and HRIS teams automate manual processes, unify people data, and deliver insights in tools like Power BI, Alteryx, and modern data platforms — while upskilling your team to own and extend the solutions.
Eliminate fragile processes: Move away from undocumented Excel and ad hoc SQL scripts to transparent, repeatable workflows.
Build reliable analytics: Stand up consistent, governed pipelines and dashboards that leaders can rely on for decisions.
Refocus your team: Free HR and analytics staff from data wrangling so they can spend more time on strategy, planning, and partnering with the business.
We design practical, HR-ready analytics solutions that fit your systems, your questions, and your pace of change.
Bring recruiting, core HR, and talent data together so you’re not chasing extracts across systems.
Replace manual spreadsheets and ad hoc SQL with repeatable workflows that cleanse, map, and join data.
Standardize definitions for headcount, turnover, time-to-fill, diversity metrics, and more so everyone uses the same numbers.
Create visual, self-service views for leadership on hiring, retention, diversity, and engagement trends.
Automate monthly and quarterly HR reports instead of rebuilding Excel decks every cycle.
Give HRBPs and managers role-based access to trusted data so they can answer everyday questions on their own.
Identify hotspots by location, manager, role, or demographic to target interventions where they’ll matter most.
Analyze hiring pipelines, time-to-fill, and source effectiveness to improve talent acquisition outcomes.
Compare pay across roles, levels, and demographics to support fair, data-driven decisions and compliance.
Help leaders understand how headcount, skills, and roles need to evolve with business plans.
Use data to flag potential flight risks or areas likely to face talent shortages.
Model “what if” questions (growth, restructuring, hybrid/remote shifts) without rebuilding everything in Excel.
We’ve worked with dozens of HR teams who were buried in manual data work and needed a better way to deliver insight.
We understand the questions HR needs to answer and the systems you rely on.
We don’t just build dashboards — we automate your processes and teach your team how to extend them.
We measure success in hours saved, fewer fire drills, and better, faster answers for your leaders and employees.
If you’re sick of manual processes, fragile spreadsheets, and feeling one request away from an all-nighter, it’s time to modernize your workforce analytics. Let’s talk.

headings.text: Upgrade Your Supply Chain with Analytics That Can Keep Up
The Reality: Your Supply Chain Has Outgrown Excel
Buried in Spreadsheets Instead of Improving the Supply Chain
What Capitalize Does for Supply Chain Teams
Deep Experience You Can Count On
Services for Purchasing, Supply Chain & Logistics Leaders
Why Supply Chain Leaders Choose Capitalize

body_copy: Capitalize helps supply chain, purchasing, and logistics teams automate data prep, streamline reporting, and unlock advanced analytics — so you can move beyond spreadsheets and focus on resilience, cost savings, and performance.
Purchasing, supply chain, and logistics teams manage data that’s simply too large and too complex for traditional analyst techniques.
Multiple plants, DCs, geographies, and channels

Ensuring the right materials, parts, and inventory are in the correct location, at the best price, when they’re needed requires serious analytical horsepower — but many teams are stuck in tools that weren’t built for the job.

Across purchasing, supply chain, and logistics, teams are drowning in raw data from countless systems — spending so much time cleansing and compiling it that there’s little left for the strategic analysis they were hired to do.
Scattered, inconsistent data: Information pours in from ERP, WMS, TMS, procurement platforms, vendor portals, and spreadsheets — each with different formats, levels of detail, and refresh cycles.
Slow, manual preparation: Teams spend days or even weeks cleansing, compiling, and reconciling data before they can run a single meaningful analysis.
Lost opportunities to optimize: By the time the data is usable, there’s little time left to analyze vendor spend, spot fraud or anomalies, or improve inventory, routing, and supplier strategies.

We help supply chain organizations move from manual, spreadsheet-heavy processes to modern, automated analytics built on tools like Alteryx, Power BI, and cloud data platforms — so your team can finally focus on high-value analysis instead of data wrangling.
Automate repetitive work: Replace manual extracts, cleansing, and reconciliations with repeatable, automated workflows that run in minutes, not days.
Unlock deeper insights: Analyze vendor spend, performance, fraud risks, and network efficiency at scale using geospatial, predictive, and forecasting models.
Enable your team: Equip your supply chain analysts to own and extend the solutions themselves, without relying on IT or black-box tools.
Connect ERP, WMS, TMS, procurement, and other systems so you’re not stitching extracts together by hand.
Cleanse, normalize, and join massive datasets using repeatable workflows instead of manual spreadsheets.
Standardize definitions for fill rate, on-time performance, lead times, and more so everyone works from the same numbers.
Track pricing, on-time delivery, quality issues, and SLAs across suppliers and regions.
Identify consolidation opportunities, maverick spend, and negotiation leverage points.
Use analytics to spot unusual activity, fraud indicators, or patterns that merit deeper review.
Analyze stock levels, turns, and service metrics across locations to right-size inventory.
Use historical data and external drivers to support more accurate forecasting and planning.
Simulate the impact of demand spikes, supplier changes, or lead time shifts before they hit your operations.
Evaluate transportation routes, carriers, and modes to identify cost and performance opportunities.
Map suppliers, plants, DCs, and customers to see where risk and inefficiency are concentrated.
Assess how changes to network design, sourcing, or logistics strategies will affect cost and service.
Supply chain teams work with some of the most complex, high-volume data in the business. You need partners who understand both that complexity and the tools that can tame it.
Deep analytics expertise in operational data
We’ve worked with purchasing, inventory, logistics, and financial data across industries.
We don’t just build reports — we help you automate processes and teach your team how to go further.
We focus on concrete outcomes — time saved, cycle times reduced, and better decisions — not just shiny dashboards.
If your team is spending days or weeks compiling data and never getting to the deeper analysis, there’s a better way. Let’s talk.

headings.text: Top 5 FP&A Tools in 2026: A Practical Buyer’s Guide for Finance & Analytics Leaders
**How We Evaluated the Best FP&A Software (2026)**
**FP&A Implementation Matters More Than the Tool**
FAQs: Choosing the Right FP&A Tool
Evaluating FP&A tools for your organization?
Can Alteryx Speed Up ERP Implementations?
Workday Adaptive Planning Use Cases and Comparisons

body_copy: Top FP&A tools for 2026, ranked by real-world adoption, scalability, and fit. A practical guide for finance and analytics leaders.

Choosing the right FP&A software in 2026 is no longer just about budgeting. Modern FP&A platforms must support driver-based forecasting, cross-functional planning, governed workflows, and clean integration into the enterprise analytics stack, without creating a disconnected “shadow planning system.”

This guide ranks the top FP&A tools in 2026 based on real-world implementation patterns and operating model outcomes. It is written for CFOs, finance leaders, and analytics teams evaluating financial planning and analysis platforms that scale with governance, automation, and analytics consumption in mind.

The best FP&A tools in 2026 are those that balance modeling depth, governance, integration, and maintainability and can publish analytics-ready outputs into BI and data platforms. Tool selection alone is not enough; operating model and implementation discipline determine long-term success.

This ranking reflects Capitalize’s experience implementing FP&A platforms across enterprise and mid-market organizations. Scores (0–5) reflect typical product positioning and implementation outcomes, not edge-case configurations.
Driver-based planning, scenarios, multi-dimensional models, cross-functional support
Approvals, audit trails, RBAC/SoD, change controls
ERP/GL/CRM connectivity, automation, reconciliation
Variance analysis, dashboards, narrative outputs, BI consumption
Admin ownership, implementation complexity, model change effort
Tool | Modeling (30%) | Workflow (20%) | Integration (20%) | Reporting (15%) | Maintainability (15%) | Score
Workday Adaptive Planning | 4.4 | 4.4 | 4.3 | 4.1 | 4.4 | 4.4
1. Workday Adaptive Planning — Best Overall FP&A Platform
Best for: Finance-owned FP&A teams prioritizing maintainability and repeatable forecasting cycles.

Workday Adaptive Planning consistently ranks as the strongest overall FP&A software for organizations that want balanced modeling power without sacrificing usability. It performs well across all evaluation dimensions, particularly Maintainability & Time-to-Value, making it a strong choice for finance teams that want to own their planning models long-term.
Strong driver-based modeling for most FP&A use cases
Finance-friendly administration and change management
Reliable workflow controls for recurring planning cycles
Clean integration patterns when actuals and drivers are standardized
Workday Adaptive Planning is best suited for organizations that want FP&A tightly governed and analytics-ready without heavy IT dependency.
2. Anaplan — Best for Complex, Cross-Functional Planning
Best for: Enterprises where modeling depth and connected planning outweigh admin simplicity.

Anaplan excels when multi-dimensional, cross-functional planning is the primary requirement. Its modeling flexibility supports advanced driver trees and scenario planning, but that flexibility must be paired with strong governance to avoid long-term maintainability issues.
Strong fit for connected planning across finance, sales, and operations
Powerful scenario analysis when standards are enforced
Without disciplined ownership, model sprawl can increase admin burden.
3. Pigment — Best for Modern Collaboration
Best for: Teams prioritizing speed, collaboration, and iterative planning cycles.

Pigment is often selected by organizations seeking a modern FP&A experience with strong stakeholder engagement. It performs well in modeling and reporting, especially when planning outputs are quickly looped into analysis.
Integration success depends heavily on data discipline
Source-of-truth definitions must be locked early
Pigment works best when paired with strong data pipelines and reconciliation controls.
4. Oracle Cloud EPM — Best for Governance & Control
Best for: Enterprises prioritizing standardized finance processes and auditability.

Oracle Cloud EPM is frequently chosen for its robust workflow, controls, and enterprise governance posture. It is well-suited for regulated environments but can feel heavier than finance-first tools depending on implementation approach.
Strong approval workflows and audit trails
Maintainability depends on operating model and admin specialization.
5. Planful — Best for Pragmatic FP&A Teams
Best for: Teams seeking structured planning without enterprise-suite overhead.
Planful delivers reliable support for budgeting, forecasting, variance analysis, and reporting. It’s often selected by teams that want predictable FP&A cycles with manageable administration.
Solid workflow for recurring FP&A processes
Popular with mid-market teams prioritizing fast deployment, lower TCO, and finance-led automation.
Strong choice when financial close, consolidation, and planning must live in a single governed footprint.
Selecting FP&A software is only half the equation. The real differentiator is whether planning becomes a governed part of your analytics ecosystem instead of a disconnected forecasting exercise.
A strong FP&A implementation should address:
Operating model alignment (finance-owned vs IT-assisted)
Data foundation integration (ERP, GL, CRM, HRIS with reconciliation)
Analytics-ready outputs for BI and KPI layers
Governance without slowdown (RBAC, audit trails, certified drivers)
Adoption & enablement to deliver value in the first planning cycle
Should organizations standardize on one FP&A tool globally?
Usually yes. Multiple tools increase reconciliation, governance, and support overhead.
What determines FP&A success more: the platform or the operating model?
The operating model. Clear ownership and data discipline matter more than features.
Planning-first or consolidation-first FP&A software?
Choose consolidation-first when close complexity dominates; planning-first when forecasting agility drives decisions.
Weak data discipline resulting in unclear hierarchies, inconsistent drivers, and poor reconciliation.
Schedule your FP&A platform assessment today!
Capitalize helps organizations implement FP&A platforms that scale, reconcile, and integrate cleanly into enterprise analytics, so planning actually drives decisions.
